entries.round: task:Implement a local file upload system for the admin panel since the app will be hosted on a VPS, not Vercel. 1. Create an API route 'src/app/api/admin/upload/route.ts' that handles multipart/form-data POST requests. 2. Save uploaded files to the 'public/uploads' directory (create it if missing) with unique filenames (e.g., using Date.now()). 3. Return the public URL of the uploaded image (e.g., '/uploads/filename.jpg'). 4. Update 'src/components/admin/RichTextEditor.tsx' and 'src/app/admin/articles/ArticleEditorForm.tsx' to use this new upload API instead of prompting for an external URL. Make sure to use <write_file> tags.
